creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Please defer to 
http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-questions and ask your 
question on that mailinglist. You do not have a problem, but a question. 
If people think there is a problem after discussion please notify me and 
we will get things straight in this ticket and assign it to someone so 
that it can be resolved. For now, close the PR.
